meta.defaultTitle: Zephandor 2-in-1 Garment Steamer & Dry Iron | Portable 1200W Travel Fabric Care

hero.copy: A refined 1200W 2-in-1 tool that heats in 15 seconds, supports vertical and horizontal steaming, and helps garments look crisp without the weight of a full ironing setup.

why.title: A cleaner, more elevated standard for everyday garment care
why.copy: Zephandor is designed for customers who want their essentials to feel considered. We bring premium visual restraint, practical performance, and direct purchase clarity into one focused brand experience.

items.title: Premium practicality
items.copy: Zephandor focuses on the details that elevate daily use: clean form, fast readiness, and strong performance without the bulk of a traditional iron setup.

items.title: Designed for real routines
items.copy: From vertical steaming at home to horizontal touch-ups in a hotel room, the 2-in-1 format adapts to the way modern wardrobes are actually maintained.

items.title: A brand built for trust
items.copy: Clear product facts, direct purchase intent, and a restrained premium aesthetic help customers feel confident from first impression to checkout.

performance.title: Visible wrinkle reduction powered by compact 1200W performance
performance.copy: The Zephandor 2-in-1 is built for real context, not just product specs. It fits the morning routine at home, the short turnaround before a meeting, and the suitcase where space matters.

useCases.copy: Refresh workwear, occasion pieces, curtains, and everyday garments with a compact tool that feels easy to reach for.

useCases.title: Quick daily touch-ups

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about Zephandor's premium, modern approach to garment care and customer trust.

hero.title: A premium garment care brand shaped around composure, convenience, and modern trust
hero.copy: Zephandor exists to make garment care feel lighter, cleaner, and more intentional. We build for customers who want polished results at home, in compact spaces, and while traveling.

about.title: Designed for the details people notice
paragraphs: From a wrinkle-free collar to the confidence of stepping out prepared, Zephandor focuses on the moments garment care quietly improves. Our products are chosen and presented to support that sense of readiness.
We also understand where many purchases happen today. That is why this website is built to create a premium brand experience while guiding customers seamlessly toward our Amazon and Etsy listings.

principles.title: Trust through clarity
principles.copy: We present products, policies, and marketplace links with straightforward language so customers know exactly what to expect.

principles.title: Premium without excess
principles.copy: Our design language is minimal and controlled because quality should feel composed rather than overstated.

principles.title: Utility with elegance
principles.copy: Zephandor products are built for real routines, where strong performance and visual refinement need to coexist.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Read the Zephandor privacy policy covering website data, contact submissions, and marketplace-related customer communication.

hero.title: How Zephandor handles information with care
hero.copy: This policy explains the limited information collected through the Zephandor website and how it may be used to support customer communication and improve the browsing experience.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.copy: Zephandor may collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, and message details when contacting us. Basic technical data such as browser type, device information, and page activity may also be collected for analytics and site performance.

sections.title: How information is used
sections.copy: Information is used to respond to support requests, improve website performance, maintain security, and better understand which pages and product details are most helpful to visitors.

sections.title: Marketplace purchases
sections.copy: Purchases completed on Amazon or Etsy are also subject to those platforms' privacy practices. Zephandor does not control the independent policies of third-party marketplaces.

sections.title: Data sharing
sections.copy: Zephandor does not sell personal information. Limited data may be shared with service providers who help operate the website, support analytics, or process communication, but only when reasonably necessary.

sections.title: Your choices
sections.copy: You may contact Zephandor to request updates or deletion of information previously shared through this website, subject to legal and operational requirements.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Review the Zephandor terms covering website use, product information, third-party marketplace purchases, and customer responsibilities.

hero.title: The terms that govern use of the Zephandor website
hero.copy: These terms outline how visitors may use the Zephandor website, how product information is presented, and how third-party marketplace purchases are handled.

sections.title: Website use
sections.copy: By using this website, you agree to use it lawfully and in a way that does not disrupt access, security, or the experience of other visitors.

sections.title: Product information
sections.copy: Zephandor aims to present accurate, current product information, but specifications, availability, prices, and listing details may change without notice. The marketplace listing in effect at the time of purchase controls the final transaction details.

sections.title: Marketplace transactions
sections.copy: Purchases completed through Amazon or Etsy are governed by those platforms' checkout processes, terms, and buyer protections. Zephandor is not responsible for independent marketplace outages, policy changes, or account issues.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.copy: All website copy, branding, layout, and original creative assets remain the property of Zephandor unless otherwise stated and may not be reused without permission.

sections.title: Updates
sections.copy: These terms may be updated periodically. Continued use of the website after changes are posted indicates acceptance of the revised terms.

meta.title: Shipping & Returns
meta.description: Review Zephandor shipping expectations, return guidance, and how marketplace orders are handled through Amazon and Etsy.

hero.title: Straightforward guidance for delivery timelines and post-purchase support
hero.copy: Zephandor is committed to clear expectations before checkout. Because purchases are completed on Amazon or Etsy, some shipping and return details are finalized by the marketplace where the order is placed.

sections.title: Order processing
sections.copy: Processing times vary by listing and marketplace. Customers should review the delivery estimate shown on the relevant Amazon or Etsy product page before placing an order.

sections.title: Shipping timelines
sections.copy: Shipping windows depend on destination, inventory availability, and carrier conditions. Marketplace tracking information is the most reliable source for live shipping updates after purchase.

sections.title: Returns
sections.copy: If your order was placed on Amazon or Etsy, return eligibility and the return workflow are governed by that platform's policy and the specific listing terms. Please start the request within your order account for the fastest resolution.

sections.title: Damaged or incorrect orders
sections.copy: If an item arrives damaged or does not match the listing, contact the marketplace support channel tied to your order and keep all packaging, photos, and order details available.

sections.title: Need extra help?
sections.copy: For general product questions before ordering, please visit the Contact page. For active orders, always begin with the marketplace where the purchase was completed.

product.name: Zephandor 2-in-1 Garment Steamer & Dry Iron
product.tagline: Luxury-level garment care in a compact tool made for home, travel, and daily polish.
product.description: Zephandor combines vertical steaming and dry ironing in one refined 2-in-1 design, giving you fast heat-up, fabric-friendly performance, and a more elevated way to keep clothing presentation-ready.
features: 1200W power for steady, effective wrinkle release
Ready in 15 seconds for quick daily touch-ups
65ml water tank for lightweight, travel-friendly use
Vertical and horizontal steaming for flexible garment care
Drip-free ceramic panel for smoother finishing across delicate and everyday fabrics
Adjustable steam output for different fabric needs
Auto shut-off for added confidence during use
Compact design suited to home storage, business trips, and vacation packing
benefits: Keep pieces looking sharp at home without pulling out a full ironing setup.
Travel with one compact tool instead of packing separate steaming and pressing options.
Handle quick touch-ups before meetings, dinners, departures, and daily routines with less effort.

featureHighlights.label: 1200W power
featureHighlights.detail: Strong, steady output for fast wrinkle release.

featureHighlights.label: 15s heat-up
featureHighlights.detail: Ready quickly when time is short and presentation matters.

featureHighlights.label: 65ml water tank
featureHighlights.detail: Sized for easy handling and compact travel packing.

featureHighlights.label: Drip-free ceramic panel
featureHighlights.detail: Smoother contact with fabrics and a cleaner finish.

featureHighlights.label: Adjustable steam
featureHighlights.detail: More control across delicate and everyday garments.

featureHighlights.label: Auto shut-off
featureHighlights.detail: Added confidence for daily use and travel routines.

featureHighlights.label: Travel-friendly design
featureHighlights.detail: Built to move easily between closet, suitcase, and hotel room.

faqs.question: What fabrics can the Zephandor 2-in-1 handle?
faqs.answer: It is designed for a wide range of everyday fabrics, including cotton, linen, wool, silk, polyester, and blended garments. As with any heated fabric-care tool, delicate trims and specialty finishes should be spot-checked first.

faqs.question: How quickly is it ready to use?
faqs.answer: The unit heats up in approximately 15 seconds, making it ideal for polished last-minute touch-ups before meetings, events, or travel.

faqs.question: Is it suitable for travel?
faqs.answer: Yes. The compact body and 65ml water tank were selected to keep the device lightweight and easy to pack without sacrificing premium performance.

faqs.question: Where can I buy Zephandor products?
faqs.answer: Zephandor products are available through carefully managed marketplace listings on Amazon and Etsy, linked directly throughout this website.

faqs.question: Does the steamer include automatic safety protection?
faqs.answer: Yes. The product includes an auto shut-off function to support safer daily use and added peace of mind.

faqs.question: How do returns and delivery work?
faqs.answer: Order processing, delivery timelines, and return policies may vary slightly by sales channel. Our Shipping & Returns page outlines the standard Zephandor policy and explains how Amazon and Etsy orders are handled.
